simplesect.para: Non-NULL on success, NULL on invalid args or OOM.

detaileddescription.para: Free all resources. NULL is a no-op.
Zero history and output parity without freeing.
Returns the FIR branch length passed to hbdecim_r2c_create.

memberdef.argsstring: (hbdecim_r2c_state_t *r, const float *in, size_t num_in, float _Complex *out, size_t max_out)
memberdef.name: hbdecim_r2c_execute

briefdescription.para: Decimate real float32 input by 2, producing CF32.

detaileddescription.para: Algorithm: Input is split into even (x[2m]) and odd (x[2m+1]) streams, each stored in its own dual-write circular delay line. One output per pair:
N even (fir_on_even=1): I = antisymmetric FIR on even stream Q = delay_sign × 0.5 × odd[centre]
N odd (fir_on_even=0): Q = antisymmetric FIR on odd stream (at offset +1) I = delay_sign × 0.5 × even[centre]
Output: y[m] = (I + jQ) × (-1)^m (parity flip provides fs/4 shift)
Coefficients are baked as h_mod[k] = h_fir[k] × (-1)^k × 0.5.
